blocked_or_held_universes.system_label: power generation and backup equipment buildout
utility and large-load power demand pressure

why_universe_discovery_passed: The run surfaced three coherent bounded universes from mixed-source evidence without benchmark-seeded renaming.
The run also blocked four weaker or broader lanes instead of promoting everything with corroboration.
The strongest surfaced universe was the constrained-layer transformer and grid-equipment lane.
why_final_expression_not_proven: The blind-run freeze stops at bounded-universe formation rather than final public-expression ranking.
Trade-press coverage inside the frozen window was sparse, so the power-demand branch stayed broader than later downstream work.
